name: file-sync-lambda
description: Lambda function to sync S3 events to FileObject DB records

scripts.bundle: npm run build && rm -rf bundle_tmp && mkdir bundle_tmp && cp dist/lambda/file-sync/*.js bundle_tmp/ && mkdir -p bundle_tmp/lib/generated && cp -r dist/lib/generated/prisma bundle_tmp/lib/generated/ && cp -rL node_modules bundle_tmp/ && rm -rf bundle_tmp/node_modules/@prisma/studio-core bundle_tmp/node_modules/@prisma/engines bundle_tmp/node_modules/@prisma/fetch-engine bundle_tmp/node_modules/@prisma/get-platform bundle_tmp/node_modules/@prisma/dev bundle_tmp/node_modules/@prisma/client/runtime/query_compiler_fast* bundle_tmp/node_modules/@prisma/client/runtime/query_compiler_small* bundle_tmp/node_modules/@prisma/client/runtime/wasm-compiler* bundle_tmp/node_modules/prisma bundle_tmp/node_modules/typescript bundle_tmp/node_modules/@electric-sql && cd bundle_tmp && zip -r ../function.zip . && cd .. && rm -rf bundle_tmp
